title: Allow sha256: prefix for input
body:
We should allow users to pass in image ids with the sha256: prefix
for local images.

Resolves: #493

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: @baude could you quickly modify a test to see this work?  Also have a test to make sure you can not pass in a "" name to make sure it does not crash?
updated with unit and integration test

:pushpin: Commit a6026d4 has been approved by `baude`
